overview.useShortcutHint: Use a shortcut to begin dictating into the focused application.
overview.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Start dictating to see your stats here.
overview.welcomeDesc: Your AI-powered voice dictation assistant. Use your shortcuts to start dictating.

history.noEntries: No entries yet. Use a shortcut to start dictating.
history.confirmDeleteEntryDesc: This will permanently remove the entry and its audio recording.
history.confirmClearAllDesc: This will permanently delete all {{count}} entries and their audio recordings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.launchOnLoginDesc: Start in the system tray on boot.
settings.sendContextDesc: Sends focused app and selection to the model.
settings.telemetryDesc: Technical telemetry only: no audio or dictated text. Builds without OTLP config stay local-only.
settings.toggleHint: Press to start, press again to send.
settings.pushToTalkHint: Hold to speak, release to send.
settings.revealModeHint: How text appears in the target field.
settings.resetShortcutCaptureHint: If shortcuts stop responding, click this to reset the shortcut capture lock.
settings.restartSetupWizardHint: Walk through the setup wizard again.
settings.hookFailedMessage: The keyboard hook failed. Check that no antivirus or security software is blocking it, or try running the app as administrator.
settings.fallbackClipboardHint: If text insertion fails, the result stays in your clipboard. All settings can be changed later.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: AI-powered voice dictation that works in any application. Speak naturally, and Ditado will transcribe and insert your text wherever you're typing.
onboarding.featureContextAware: Context-aware: understands what app you're in and adapts its output
onboarding.featureStreaming: Real-time streaming: see your words appear as you speak
onboarding.featureWorksEverywhere: Works everywhere: dictate into any text field on your computer
onboarding.connectApiDesc: Ditado uses OpenRouter to access AI models. Enter your API key to get started.
onboarding.makeItYoursDesc: Choose the look and language that feels right for you.
onboarding.microphoneAccessDesc: Ditado needs mic permission to capture your voice.
onboarding.tryPushToTalkDesc: Hold the shortcut while you speak. When you release, Ditado types what you said into whatever field was focused — no clicking, no typing.
onboarding.tryToggleDesc: Select existing text, press the shortcut, and speak the corrected version. Ditado replaces the selection — or inserts at the cursor if nothing is selected.
onboarding.allSetDesc: Ditado lives in the system tray. Use your shortcuts to dictate into any focused field.
onboarding.suggestedPhrasesPtt: Schedule a meeting for next Tuesday at 2 PM with a video call link.
onboarding.suggestedPhrasesToggle: Rewrite this more formally: thanks for reaching out, we will be in touch soon.
onboarding.holdAndSpeak: Click the box below, then hold {{hotkey}} and speak
onboarding.pressToStartStop: Select the text below, then press {{hotkey}} to start and stop
onboarding.textWillAppear: Your dictated text will appear here…
onboarding.demoCompleteToAdvance: Complete the demo above to continue, or skip.
onboarding.demoInstruction: Click the box below, then use your shortcut
